summary: Mobile UX audit for NLYT SaaS app. Tested hamburger menu, breadcrumbs, CTAs, delete modal, and horizontal overflow at 375px viewport. Fixed ImpactPage.js nav overflow issue. All mobile responsive features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Nav had horizontal overflow on mobile (375px). Missing responsive classes for nav buttons and logo tagline.

issues: Hero CTA button bounding box reports 24px height but visually appears correct. May be measurement artifact.

mobile_hamburger_menu: ✅ Hamburger menu button visible on mobile (375px)
✅ Drawer opens with Tableau de bord, Paramètres, Déconnexion links
✅ Drawer closes on X button click
desktop_nav_unchanged: ✅ Desktop nav links visible at 768px (Tableau de bord, Paramètres, Déconnexion)
breadcrumbs_mobile: ✅ AppBreadcrumb renders on all settings pages
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Accueil' (shortLabel) on mobile instead of 'Tableau de bord'
✅ Breadcrumb has scrollbar-none class for hidden scrollbar
dashboard_ctas: ✅ 'Créer un engagement' button is full-width (343px) on mobile
✅ 'Créer un engagement' button height is 44px (min touch target)
✅ 'Créer un engagement' button is NOT full-width on desktop (232px)
engagement_card_buttons: ✅ 'Voir détails' button has h-9 (36px) height on mobile
✅ 'Relancer' button has h-9 (36px) height on mobile
✅ Delete button has adequate touch target (36x36px)
dashboard_tabs: ✅ Tabs container has overflow-x-auto class for horizontal scroll
✅ Tabs have scrollbar-none class for hidden scrollbar
delete_modal_mobile: ✅ Delete modal buttons stack vertically on mobile (flex-col-reverse)
✅ Cancel button is full-width (295px) with 44px height
✅ Confirm button is full-width (295px) with 44px height
settings_pages_mobile: ✅ Profile page: px-4 padding on mobile, action button after description
landing_page_mobile: ✅ Nav fits at 375px: logo + Impact + S'inscrire
✅ Impact button shows 'Impact' text on mobile (not 'Gestes solidaires')
✅ Signup button shows 'S'inscrire' on mobile (not 'Créer un engagement')
impact_page_mobile: ✅ Footer stacks on mobile after fix

critical_code_review_comments: ImpactPage.js nav was not responsive - fixed by adding same responsive classes as LandingPage.js
All mobile UX features implemented correctly: hamburger menu, compact breadcrumbs, full-width CTAs, stacked modal buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UX audit complete. All pages tested at 375x812 viewport. ImpactPage.js nav was fixed to match LandingPage.js responsive nav. Hamburger menu works on all authenticated pages. Delete modal buttons stack vertically on mobile. No horizontal overflow on any page.

changes: Added responsive classes to nav: px-4 sm:px-6, gap-2 sm:gap-3, text-xs sm:text-sm
Added hidden sm:block to logo tagline
Added hidden sm:inline / sm:hidden for button text variants
Added hidden sm:inline-flex to Connexion button
Fixed footer to stack on mobile: flex-col sm:flex-row, gap-2, text-center sm:text-left
fix_applied.reason: ImpactPage.js nav was causing horizontal overflow on mobile because it didn't have the same responsive classes as LandingPage.js
